<!--
Thanks for contributing! Before submitting, please confirm the checklist below.
PRs that don't follow the format will be asked to revise before merge.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- Brief description: adding a new app, fixing a URL, moving a category, adding a field report, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] App is in OpenAI's official [ChatGPT Apps Directory](https://chatgpt.com/apps) (this list tracks the official directory only — not all Apps SDK / MCP servers).
- [ ] Entry follows the format: `- [App Name](https://example.com) - Description. *Use case: ...*`
- [ ] Description is one concise sentence ending in a period.
- [ ] Use case is specific and practical, not marketing copy.
- [ ] Entry is placed in the correct category and added in alphabetical order.
- [ ] No duplicate entries (apps already listed in another category).
- [ ] URL points to the canonical homepage of the app or vendor.

## Type of change

- [ ] New app
- [ ] URL correction
- [ ] Description / use case improvement
- [ ] Category move
- [ ] Field report
- [ ] Other (describe)
